positive: Symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and intertwined celestial vines. The central composition features stylized, glowing exotic leaves, trumpet-like flowers, and abstract cosmic patterns suspended in deep space, resembling a mystical jungle meeting an aurora borealis. Style must be highly detailed, clean vector art, combining Art Nouveau elegance with psychedelic cosmic elements. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, royal purple, electric cyan, and vibrant glowing lime accents. Strong defined silhouettes, intricate detail, perfect radial symmetry, optimal for high-quality textile printing on apparel.
